query:
UPDATE api_keys
                SET health_status = $2,
                    failure_streak = $3,
                    cooldown_until = $4,
                    last_error = $5,
                    last_status_code = $6,
                    last_success_at = COALESCE($7, last_success_at),
                    updated_at = $8
                WHERE id = $1
